description:
Bambu Studio is a cutting-edge, feature-rich slicing software. It contains project-based workflows, systematically optimized slicing algorithms, and an easy-to-use graphic interface, bringing users an incredibly smooth printing experience.


This version is based on the 2.7.1 Public Release and includes optimizations for Studio startup slowdown issues on certain MacOS versions. Affected MacOS users are encouraged to upgrade as soon as possible. This release also includes several other bug fixes.
Bug Fixes
1. Fixed a potential startup slowdown issue on certain MacOS versions. Thanks to @BenJule for the contribution. An option to enable or disable Filament Management has been added in Preferences. On MacOS, this option is disabled by default.
2. Fixed an issue where network plugin installation could fail for some MacOS users (excluding MacOS 27 and later versions).
3. Fixed a path planning error that could occur in certain scenarios when using cross-Z-height coloring in mixed-color printing.
4. Fixed a UI flickering issue with the X2D Filament Track Switch.
5. Fixed an issue with the "Connect Same Color" feature in the Painting Tool.
6. Fixed an issue where the Device page could crash or become unresponsive in certain scenarios.
7. Fixed a crash that occurred when opening certain MakerWorld models. Special thanks to @BenJule once again.
